9:I[4902,["972","static/chunks/972-f95eba36e5b3e2f0.js","712","static/chunks/712-e9f9c3e9efc235ab.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-617a56f61b4275a2.js"],"AuthProvider"]
a:I[4114,["972","static/chunks/972-f95eba36e5b3e2f0.js","712","static/chunks/712-e9f9c3e9efc235ab.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-617a56f61b4275a2.js"],"Navbar"]
4:T19df,<h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Calculate Your AI Invisibility Tax</h2><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed">Most medical practices don't realize they're losing thousands monthly to AI-diverted patients. This calculator reveals the true cost.</p><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">The Formula</h2><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed">```
Monthly AI Queries x Capture Rate x Conversion Rate x Average Value = Revenue Impact
```</p><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Average Medical Practice Example</h2><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Input Variables</h3><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed">| Factor | Value | Source |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Monthly AI queries (your specialty + city) | 2,400 | Industry data |
| AI recommendation capture (your practice) | 6% | Current visibility |
| AI recommendation capture (competitors) | 94% | Market average |
| <strong class="text-white">AI-diverted patients</strong> | <strong class="text-white">~38/month</strong> | Calculated |
| Average patient value | $8,500 | Your data |</p><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">The Math</h3><ul class="list-disc list-inside space-y-2 text-gray-300 my-6 pl-4"><li>Monthly AI-diverted patients: 38</li><li>Average procedure value: $8,500</li><li>**Monthly revenue loss: $323,000**</li><li>**Annual revenue loss: $3.88M**</li></ul><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">By Specialty Breakdown</h2><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed">| Specialty | Monthly AI Queries | Avg Patient Value | Annual Loss (6% capture) |
|-----------|-------------------|-------------------|-------------------------|
| Plastic Surgery | 3,800 | $15,000 | $6.84M |
| Dental Implants | 2,100 | $12,000 | $3.02M |
| MedSpa | 4,500 | $3,500 | $1.89M |
| Orthodontics | 2,800 | $6,500 | $2.18M |
| Fertility | 1,200 | $25,000 | $3.60M |</p><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">The Compound Effect</h2><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed">AI visibility compounds over time:</p><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed"><strong class="text-white">Month 1-3</strong>: Foundation phase (minimal visible results)
<strong class="text-white">Month 4-6</strong>: Authority building (20-30% improvement)
<strong class="text-white">Month 7-12</strong>: Competitive displacement (50-70% improvement)
<strong class="text-white">Year 2+</strong>: Market dominance (80-95% improvement)</p><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Recovery Calculator</h2><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Scenario: Plastic Surgery Practice</h3><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed"><strong class="text-white">Current State:</strong>
- Monthly AI queries: 3,800
- Current capture: 6%
- Monthly AI patients: 14
- Annual revenue: $2.52M</p><p class="text-lg font-semibold text-primary my-6">After 12-Month GEO Program:
- Improved capture: 68%
- Monthly AI patients: 156
- Annual revenue: $28.08M
- Additional revenue: $25.56M</p><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">ROI Analysis</h3><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed">| Investment | 12-Month Return | ROI |
|------------|----------------|-----|
| $50,000 GEO implementation | $25.56M | 51,020% |
| $75,000 comprehensive program | $25.56M | 34,080% |
| $100,000 enterprise program | $25.56M | 25,460% |</p><p class="text-lg font-semibold text-primary my-6">Payback period: 7-14 days</p><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Why Practices Underestimate the Loss</h2><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">1. Invisible Problem
Patients diverted by AI never visit your website—you never know they existed.</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">2. Attribution Gap
Analytics shows "direct traffic" or "organic search"—not AI referral source.</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">3. Gradual Erosion
Loss happens slowly, month by month, as AI adoption increases.</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">4. Competitive Blindness
You see competitor growth but don't understand the AI factor.</h3><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Real Practice Examples</h2><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Beverly Hills Plastic Surgery
- **Annual loss (pre-GEO)**: $2.22M
- **Recovery after 6 months**: $1.2M
- **Full recovery**: Month 10</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Miami Dental Implants
- **Annual loss (pre-GEO)**: $3.86M
- **Prevented loss after 6 months**: $3.4M
- **ROI**: 1,999%</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">California MedSpa Chain
- **Annual loss (6 locations)**: $2.63M
- **AI revenue after 6 months**: $4.2M
- **Net improvement**: $6.83M swing</h3><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">The Self-Assessment</h2><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Questions to Answer:</h3><ol class="list-decimal list-inside space-y-2 text-gray-300 my-6 pl-4"><li>What percentage of your patients mention finding you "online" without specifying Google?</li><li>Have you seen unexplained declines in consultation bookings despite steady rankings?</li><li>Are competitors with worse Google rankings getting more patients?</li><li>Do patients seem unusually well-informed before calling?</li></ol><p class="text-lg font-semibold text-primary my-6">3+ "yes" answers = High probability of AI diversion</p><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">Next Steps</h2><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Immediate Actions (This Week)
1. Test your AI visibility: Ask ChatGPT about your specialty in your city
2. Calculate your loss using the formula above
3. Audit your current schema markup</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Short-Term (This Month)
1. Implement basic MedicalOrganization schema
2. Create 5 FAQ pages with structured markup
3. Establish RealSelf presence</h3><h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-4 text-white">Long-Term (6 Months)
1. Full GEO implementation
2. Content authority building
3. Continuous monitoring and optimization</h3><h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mt-12 mb-6 text-white">The Bottom Line</h2><p class="text-gray-300 mb-6 leading-relaxed">AI invisibility isn't a theoretical problem—it's a measurable revenue leak. The practices that calculate this cost accurately are the ones that act quickly to fix it.</p><p class="text-lg font-semibold text-primary my-6">Every month you wait costs $100K-$500K in diverted revenue.</p>6:["id","hidden-cost-calculator","d"]

b:[["$","meta","0",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"theme-color","content":"#0B0F19"}],["$","meta","2",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","title","3",{"children":"Stackmatrices"}],["$","meta","4",{"name":"description","content":"GEO Agency for Medical Practices | Recover patients lost to AI. We help plastic surgeons, dentists, and medspas get recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI.
